name: GiftInfo
description: Describes a service message about a regular gift that was sent or received.

fields.name: owned_gift_id
fields.description: Unique identifier of the received gift for the bot; only present for gifts received on behalf of business accounts

fields.name: convert_star_count
fields.description: Number of Telegram Stars that can be claimed by the receiver by converting the gift; omitted if conversion to Telegram Stars is impossible

fields.name: prepaid_upgrade_star_count
fields.description: Number of Telegram Stars that were prepaid for the ability to upgrade the gift

fields.name: is_upgrade_separate
fields.description: True, if the gift's upgrade was purchased after the gift was sent

fields.name: can_be_upgraded
fields.description: True, if the gift can be upgraded to a unique gift

fields.name: text
fields.description: Text of the message that was added to the gift

fields.name: entities
fields.description: Special entities that appear in the text

fields.name: is_private
fields.description: True, if the sender and gift text are shown only to the gift receiver; otherwise, everyone will be able to see them

fields.name: unique_gift_number
fields.description: Unique number reserved for this gift when upgraded. See the number field in UniqueGift.
